title: cynometra ramiflora
intro: Cynometra ramiflora, also known as the Bata or Bata tree, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynometra ramiflora include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antihelmintic agent. The herbal preparation of Cynometra ramiflora can be made into a decoction or infusion, which is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
